task.en:
In Notes, create TWO separate notes.

The first note is titled exactly `Sprint Plan` and its body must contain these three lines after the title:
```
Lead: Dana Okafor
Start: 2026-08-03
Demo: Friday Aug 21
```

The second, separate note is titled exactly `Sprint Risks` and its body must contain these two lines after the title:
```
Risk: vendor API slip
Mitigation: parallel mock service
```

Create both as distinct notes. Do not add any other notes.

pre_command: tccutil reset AppleEvents com.apple.Notes 2>/dev/null; killall -9 Notes osascript 2>/dev/null; UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Notes',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 4; open -gj -a Notes 2>/dev/null; sleep 8; osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note' -e 'tell application "Notes" to delete every note in folder "Recently Deleted"' -e 'tell application "Notes" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: N=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$N" | grep -qF 'Sprint Plan' && echo True || echo False

NBSP=$(printf '\302\240'); B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Sprint Plan"' 2>/dev/null | sed -e 's/<[^>]*>/ /g' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed "s/$NBSP/ /g" | tr -s ' \t'); ( printf '%s' "$B" | grep -qF 'Lead: Dana Okafor' ) && ( printf '%s' "$B" | grep -qF 'Demo: Friday Aug 21' ) && echo True || echo False
N=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get name of every note' 2>/dev/null); echo "$N" | grep -qF 'Sprint Risks' && echo True || echo False

NBSP=$(printf '\302\240'); B=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get body of note "Sprint Risks"' 2>/dev/null | sed -e 's/<[^>]*>/ /g' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed "s/$NBSP/ /g" | tr -s ' \t'); ( printf '%s' "$B" | grep -qF 'Risk: vendor API slip' ) && ( printf '%s' "$B" | grep -qF 'Mitigation: parallel mock service' ) && echo True || echo False
